reasoning: Both audits confirm the package contains only static theme files and standard metadata. PKGBUILD uses verified HTTPS source with checksum, and .install script is informational-only with no executable logic. QML/config files show no malicious behavior.
coverage_issues: qwen model failed to review source tarball contents (QML/config files) which execute in SDDM context
Deepseek skipped binary tarball without extracting contents for review
false_negatives: qwen model missed reviewing QML files (runtime-executed code) due to shallow coverage
learnings: Prioritize extraction/review of source archives containing runtime-executed files (QML/scripts)
Enforce review of all files referenced in PKGBUILD install steps
Improve handling of binary files: auto-extract common formats for content review
Adjust file selection heuristics to prioritize runtime artifacts over metadata (e.g. QML > LICENSE)
